responses.finding: PublishRequestSubmittedEvent and WorldPublishedEvent are instantiated but never emitted to any event bus or sink
responses.detail: Added optional DomainEventBus dependency to PublishToFamilyLibraryService.setup(). Events are now emitted via _event_bus.emit(): PublishRequestSubmittedEvent on every submission, WorldPublishedEvent when parent self-publishes. Guarded with null check on _event_bus.

responses.finding: Review and unpublish flows also instantiate events without emitting them
responses.detail: Added optional DomainEventBus dependency to ReviewPublishRequestService.setup(). On approval: emits PublishApprovedEvent + WorldPublishedEvent. On rejection: emits PublishRejectedEvent. All guarded with null check on _event_bus.
Added null guard to can_approve(), can_reject(), and can_unpublish(). All return false for null profiles, matching the existing pattern in can_request_publish().

responses.finding: UnpublishWorldService still instantiates WorldUnpublishedEvent without emitting it to any event bus or sink
responses.detail: Added optional DomainEventBus dependency to UnpublishWorldService.setup(). WorldUnpublishedEvent is now emitted via _event_bus.emit() after the request is saved. Guarded with null check on _event_bus. Follows the same pattern as the other publishing services.

summary: All 4 findings addressed. All three publishing services (publish, review, unpublish) now have optional DomainEventBus dependency and properly emit events through _event_bus.emit(). PublishingPolicy null guards added. The complete publishing event flow is now: PublishRequestSubmittedEvent → PublishApprovedEvent/PublishRejectedEvent → WorldPublishedEvent/WorldUnpublishedEvent.
